info.title: QR Maker API
info.description: Developer API to generate customized QR codes on the fly using standard HTTP requests.

get.summary: Generate a QR code (Public / Standard Rate Limits)
get.description: Generate custom styled QR codes using standard rate limits without authentication.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The URL or text content to encode. Must be properly URL-encoded.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description:
Output format: png (raw binary file), svg (vector
                                    graphic), or base64 (JSON wrapping Data URI).

parameters.name: size
parameters.description:
Width and height in pixels (for png and base64). Min:
                                    64, Max: 4096.

parameters.name: fgColor
parameters.description:
Hex color code for the foreground/pixels. Do not include a leading
                                        #.

parameters.name: bgColor
parameters.description:
Hex color code for background. Ignored if transparent=true. Do
                                        not include #.

parameters.name: transparent
parameters.description: Set to true or 1 for a transparent background.

parameters.name: margin
parameters.description: Quiet-zone border size in modules. Min: 0, Max: 10.

parameters.name: ecl
parameters.description:
Error Correction Level: L (Low), M (Medium),
                                    Q (Quartile), H (High).

parameters.name: cornerRadius
parameters.description:
Quiet-zone background card border radius percentage. Min: 0, Max:
                                    100.

parameters.name: cornerStyle
parameters.description:
Rendering style of modules: square, rounded,
                                    circle, leaf, beveled.

parameters.name: icon
parameters.description:
Overlay an icon: link, globe,
                                    text, wifi, contact, email,
                                    phone, map-pin, sms, event,
                                    github, linkedin, instagram,
                                    facebook, whatsapp, youtube,
                                    patreon, discord, pinterest. You can
                                    also pass any URL-encoded custom emoji (e.g., icon=%F0%9F%9A%80 for
                                    🚀). Emojis are fully rendered in SVG output and clear the background card space in
                                    PNG output.

parameters.name: iconSize
parameters.description: Percentage width of center icon. Min: 10, Max: 30.

parameters.name: iconColor
parameters.description:
Hex color code for the center icon. Defaults to fgColor. Do not
                                        include #.

parameters.name: iconBg
parameters.description:
Shape of the backing card behind the icon: rounded,
                                    circle, square, or none.

400.description: Invalid parameter values or missing content

get.summary: Generate a QR code (Plus / Higher Rate Limits)
get.description: Generate custom styled QR codes using higher rate limits (requires Bearer API key).

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The URL or text content to encode. Must be properly URL-encoded.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description:
Output format: png (raw binary file), svg (vector
                                    graphic), or base64 (JSON wrapping Data URI).

                                    also pass any URL-encoded custom emoji (e.g., icon=%F0%9F%9A%80 for

parameters.name: iconSize
parameters.description: Percentage width of center icon. Min: 10, Max: 30.

parameters.name: iconColor
parameters.description:
Hex color code for the center icon. Defaults to fgColor. Do not
                                        include #.

parameters.name: iconBg
parameters.description:
Shape of the backing card behind the icon: rounded,
                                    circle, square, or none.

400.description: Invalid parameter values or missing content

data.description: Base64 encoded Data URI of the generated QR code image.
